description.value:
Dockmaster's measurements and tide-marks — Fjordmål dockmasters measure the balance of every load against expected wave action; they eventually applied the same mathematics to blade-balance, producing weapons that feel steady when the ground beneath them is not.

Effect: You gain an edge on strikes made while you are on unstable footing — such as on a boat, ice, rubble, uneven ground, or other precarious surfaces (Director adjudicates).

Rules: Edge; Strike.

project.prerequisites: A weapon of at least basic quality; a tide-mark rod from a Fjordmål dockmaster's kit
